Package microui.feedback

Class TextTooltipContent

java.lang.Object
microui.core.base.View
microui.core.base.SpatialView
microui.core.base.ContentView
microui.feedback.TooltipContent
microui.feedback.TextTooltipContent
All Implemented Interfaces:
Visible
public final class TextTooltipContent extends TooltipContent
Tooltip content implementation that displays text with customizable styling. Extends TooltipContent to provide a text-based tooltip with automatic sizing based on text content and multiline support.

This class manages text tooltips with theme integration, automatic size calculation, and configurable text properties. It supports multiline text (using newline characters) and automatically adjusts its dimensions to fit the text content.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • TextTooltipContent

      public TextTooltipContent(String text)
      Constructs a TextTooltipContent with the specified text. Initializes with default styling from the current theme.
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display in the tooltip (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if text is null

  • Method Details

    • getTextSize

      public int getTextSize()
      Returns the current text size.
      Returns:
      the text size in points

    • setTextSize

      public void setTextSize(int textSize)
      Sets the text size.
      Parameters:
      textSize - the text size in points (must be в‰Ґ MIN_TEXT_SIZE)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if textSize is less than MIN_TEXT_SIZE

      public void setTextColor(AbstractColor textColor)

      Throws:

    • isPreparedShow

      public boolean isPreparedShow()
      Checks if the tooltip is prepared to show. The tooltip can show if it has non-blank text content.
      Specified by:
      isPreparedShow in class TooltipContent
      Returns:
      true if tooltip has text to display, false otherwise

    • isPreparedClose

      public boolean isPreparedClose()
      Checks if the tooltip is prepared to close. Text tooltips can always close.
      Specified by:
      isPreparedClose in class TooltipContent
      Returns:
      always true for text tooltips

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Returns the current text content.
      Returns:
      the text content

    • setText

      public void setText(String text)
      Sets the text content and automatically adjusts tooltip size. Supports multiline text using newline characters ('\n').
      Parameters:
      text - the text to display (cannot be null)
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if text is null
